programme.desc: Coverage from the 10th stage of the Grand Tour race, a 166.6km mountain route from Aurillac to Le Lioran, as the race returns after a rest day. This stage last year saw Great Britain's Simon Yates claim his one and only stage victory as he finished clear of Dutch cyclist Thymen Arensman and Ireland's Ben Healy. Healy's third place finish at this point moved him top of the general classification, a place above eventual winner Tadej Pogacar.

programme.title: Live: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner v Alexander Zverez. Coverage of the men's singles final, which takes place at the All England Club, as the winner of the third Grand Slam title of the year is decided. This is the first such final since 2022 that won't involve Carlos Alcaraz, who missed the tournament through injury, leaving world number one Jannik Sinner as favourite to build on his triumph of last year. Sinner became the first Italian to win the men's singles here and he made it through to this match thanks to a straight sets victory over Novak Djokovic in the semi-finals.
